en.atmosphere: Saitama rail junction, remote commuter station. Cheap, safe-ish. 86-min grind to center.
en.landmarks: Takasaki line, rural outskirts, minimal landmarks.
en.food: 21 venues, mostly picks. Sparse food landscape.
en.nightlife: Dead. 1 midnight spot max. Early sleepers only.

ja.atmosphere: 埼玉線. 遠い。家賃安い。中央まで86分。
ja.landmarks: 高崎線。郊外。建造物ほぼなし。
ja.food: 食堂21軒。頼り。選択肢少ない。

ru.atmosphere: Линия Такасаки, пригород, дешево, 86 мин до центра.
